market_pulse: Competitors ramping weekend lineups aggressively—Tiesto/Alesso at LIV/TAO, Steve Aoki at OMNIA, The Chainsmokers at XS, with heavy TikTok engagement on DJ announcements and pool party content.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Competitor weekend bookings are A-tier (Tiesto, Steve Aoki, The Chainsmokers)
Friday June 19: LIV Beach has Sommer Ray (model/influencer), OMNIA has Steve Aoki headlining
Social engagement on pool/dayclub content trending higher than nightclub
TikTok discovery channels active with Vegas club outfit/party content
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Lock in a marquee artist or talent for this weekend. Heavy influencer rotation happening at TAO and Palm Tree. Consider partnering with micro-influencers for user-generated content blitz.

content_gaps.description: House/tech-house discovery audio absent from LIV's recent posts; competitors (Zouk, XS, OMNIA) leveraging atmospheric/hyperpop transition tracks in Stories
content_gaps.suggested_action: Audit LIV's Reel audio library; commission 2-3 trending house mixes from up-and-coming producers and feature in Stories/Reels daily

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes DJ prep/soundcheck videos missing from LIV feed; TAO/Hakkasan posting these regularly to humanize talent
content_gaps.suggested_action: Assign one content creator to film 15-30s BTS clips before each weekend event; post to Stories 2-3x during setup phase

content_gaps.description: OMNIA/Zouk using motion-graphic countdown stickers in Stories; LIV using static text. Visual differentiation opportunity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Invest in Canva Pro or hire motion designer to create 5 reusable countdown templates; deploy for all future announced sets

influencer_activity.mention: Hosting at LIV Beach today (Friday 6/19). Followers in beauty/fitness space—high engagement expected on cabana/daylife content.
Performing Saturday at TAO Beach (direct competitor dayclub). Major draw for international audience.
Headlining OMNIA Nightclub tonight (Friday 6/19). Tao Group competitor with massive social following.
XS Nightclub June 13 (past but recent buzz). Major talent, high TikTok spillover from fans.

liv_outreach_targets.reasoning: DJ booking at direct competitor (Palm Tree, MGM/TAO). Alesso has strong tech-house following. LIV could counter-book or collab for cross-promotion.
Already booked at LIV Sunday 6/21. Leverage for Stories/community posts; secondary outreach to his followers on TikTok.
